session.user:
Run the following tests and report results:
```bash cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/unit/shared/test_next_steps.py tests/commands/pr/test_create.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_exit_plan_mode_hook.py -x ```
Report whether all tests pass or if any fail.
session.assistant: I'll run the specified tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on three test files with exit-on-first-failure flag
